content: Do you have your mailbox sorted by unread messages first? After reading an email in this scenario, it will drop below unread mails, which might look like it's dissapeared depending on how many emails are in the folder.
creator: platform34

content:
Thunderbird for android only supports selecting email addresses from your contacts app. It doesn't have a built-in feature for storing and managing email address lists.

To pick a contact's email.

1. Grant Thunderbird permission to read your contacts. Long press the app's launcher icon > app info > permissions. 2. On the message compose window, tap the 3 dot menu > add from contacts.

Only contacts with an email address will be displayed.

You may have some ideas and suggestions on how this could be improved. You're welcome to raise these on Mozilla connect where the community can vote for them. https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/idb-p/ideas/label-name/thunderbird%20android

The exisiting idea linked below may be of interest. https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/an-address-book-in-thunderbird-for-android/idi-p/84952
creator: platform34
